name: lazarus-forge
description: Authoring companion for the Lazarus family. A bounded, evidence-backed, runtime-verified design-review gate for Claude Code skill / plugin / agent / MCP / hook proposals — run it BEFORE you build, get exactly one verdict (BUILD / BUILD-WITH-CHANGES / DO-NOT-BUILD / NEEDS-MORE-DETAIL), and a closed required-changes list so review converges instead of looping. Install alongside lazarus.
